text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(SQUEEE! She hasn't turned invisible at all!
That's adorable beyond words!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, Sei taught me this move yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, can you see me? I'm right here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I cannot see you at all!!!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really?! Yippee! I did it!
